raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves left ahead as shown in image; delta to waypoint 26 is +19.62° (left), so I apply 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve.
knowledge: Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683
Large right-hand curve (from driver's perspective, heading increases = left in math) begins around waypoint 24-30
Car is nearly centered on the straight, delta increases as curve approaches
Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-20° entering curve
After the right curve, track loops back left and returns — full circuit
Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves
Waypoints 0-23 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683
Right curve starts gently at wp24 (y increases), sharpens at wp27-30
Car heading stays near 0° on the straight — minimal correction needed on straight
Delta ~19° at wp26 confirms entering the right curve — need moderate left steering
